fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number of the assembly order that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the assembly order line that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the comment.
When you create an assembly order comment, a line number is created to track all comments in the Assembly Comment Line table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of when the comment was created.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code for the comment.
